title: Composite collection of Groundnut
abstract:
Twenty-one SSR loci data on 852 accessions were analyzed. This composite collection showed
rich allelic diversity (490 alleles, 23.3 alleles per locus, 246 common alleles and 244 rare alleles
at 1%), group-specific unique alleles, and common alleles sharing between subspecies and
geographical groups. Gene diversity ranged from 0.559 to 0.926, with an average of 0.819.
Unique alleles are those detected in a group of accessions
....................
